description: Framework wrapper config for PowerShell projects — used by Run-Tests.ps1 dispatcher → Run-Tests.powershell.ps1. Pester-native config (Run/Output/CodeCoverage settings) is constructed programmatically in Run-Tests.powershell.ps1 from these fields; this file documents the contract used by the per-language runner.

testing._comment_baseCommand: Documentary value — Run-Tests.powershell.ps1 invokes Pester programmatically via Invoke-Pester -PassThru, not as a CLI command. {testDir} resolved by Run-Tests.powershell.ps1 from project-config.json.
testing._comment_coverageArgs: Documentary — Pester coverage is constructed as a CodeCoverage @{ Path = '...' } hashtable inside Run-Tests.powershell.ps1, not a CLI string. {module} substitution preserved for parity with python-config.
testing._comment_coverageFullArgs: Documentary — Pester full coverage adds CoverageFormat='JaCoCo' and OutputPath in the programmatic config.
testing._comment_discoveryCommand: Pester dry-run lists discovered tests without running them. Run-Tests.powershell.ps1 may use Invoke-Pester -DryRun programmatically.
testing._comment_discoveryOutputPattern: Regex to extract file path from Pester dry-run output. Matches discovery lines like 'Discovery in test/automated/unit/.../Foo.Tests.ps1'.
testing._comment_lintCommand: PSScriptAnalyzer for Pester test files. -Severity Warning filters out informational notes.
testing._comment_stopOnFirstFailure: Pester 5+ uses -Run.SkipRemainingOnFailure programmatic config; the CLI -Strict alias is closest single-flag equivalent. Run-Tests.powershell.ps1 maps -Quick to programmatic SkipRemainingOnFailure=$true.
testing._comment_verboseFlag: Pester verbose output uses -Output Detailed (or -Output Diagnostic for more). Programmatic equivalent: Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'.
testing._comment_markers: Pester uses -Tag and -ExcludeTag for test filtering. Tag values declared in the test file via Describe/Context/It -Tag 'name'. Maps from semantic names (slow/critical/notSlow/performance) to Pester CLI args.
testing._comment_testSetup: Pester convention: shared fixtures and helpers live in TestHelpers.psm1 imported via BeforeAll { Import-Module ... }. Pester has no global discovery command for fixtures equivalent to pytest --fixtures; testSetup.discoveryCommand is null.
testing._comment_featureMarkerPattern: PowerShell tests don't have a pytest.mark.feature equivalent. Feature association is via the Describe block's -Tag attribute. Empty string disables auto-detect.

directoryStructure._comment: PowerShell projects vary widely in source layout. Defaults below are reasonable for framework-self-test contexts (appdev) and most module-based PS projects; override per project as needed.
directoryStructure.sublayerThresholdDescription: Add sublayers within a feature directory when it exceeds this many files

_comment_headerComment: PowerShell block-comment syntax for document metadata prepended by New-ProjectCodeMetadata.
